message:
Add descriptor workflow policy summary test for send_text steps

Verify that DescriptorWorkflow correctly logs a policy_summary when
executing a send_text step that gets blocked by the PolicyGatedInjector.
The test confirms:

- Workflow aborts when policy denies a send_text command
- Exactly one step log entry is recorded
- The step log contains a valid JSON policy_summary with a non-"allow"
  decision field

This ensures safety gates leave an audit trail even for descriptor-based
(YAML-defined) workflows, not just programmatic ones.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
